signInSubtitle: Sign in to join or create a match.
signUpSubtitle: Create your account to start player onboarding.
invalidCredentialsError: Invalid credentials. Please check your email and password.
emailNotConfirmedError: Your email is not confirmed yet. Please check your inbox and try again.
callbackFailedError: The confirmation link is invalid or expired. Please request a new confirmation email.
missingFieldsError: Please provide both email and password.
signUpFailedError: Unable to create account right now.
userExistsError: An account already exists with this email. Please sign in or reset your password.
invalidRedirectUrlError: Invalid signup configuration. Please contact the administrator.
profileTriggerError: User profile creation failed in the database. Run the SQL fix for the signup trigger.
authConfigError: Invalid authentication configuration (Supabase keys or project). Check Vercel environment variables.
rateLimitedError: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
checkEmailInfo: Account created. Please check your email to confirm signup.
passwordUpdatedInfo: Password updated. You can now sign in.
resetPasswordRequestSubtitle: Enter your email address. We'll send you a link to reset your password.
resetPasswordChooseSubtitle: Set your new password to finish recovery.
resetPasswordEmailSentInfo: If an account exists for this email, a reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox.
resetPasswordInvalidLinkError: This reset link is invalid or expired. Request a new email below.
resetPasswordSendFailedError: Unable to send the reset email. Please try again in a moment.
passwordTooShortError: Password must contain at least 8 characters.
passwordUpdatedRedirecting: Password updated successfully. Redirecting to sign-in...
